products.name: Laptop Pro 15
products.description: High-performance laptop with 15-inch Retina display, 16GB RAM, and 512GB SSD

products.name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
products.description: Premium over-ear headphones with 30-hour battery and active noise cancellation

products.name: Ergonomic Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: Split ergonomic layout with Cherry MX switches, RGB backlight, and USB-C

products.name: 4K Ultra HD Monitor 27"
products.description: 27-inch IPS panel, 4K resolution, 144Hz refresh rate, HDR400, USB-C hub

products.name: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
products.description: Compact hub with HDMI 4K, 3x USB-A, SD card reader, PD charging, and Ethernet

products.name: Wireless Vertical Mouse
products.description: Ergonomic vertical design reduces wrist strain, 2.4GHz wireless, 6 buttons

products.name: Portable SSD 1TB
products.description: Ultra-fast external SSD with 1050MB/s read speed, USB 3.2, shock-resistant

products.name: Webcam 4K Pro
products.description: 4K 30fps webcam with autofocus, built-in ring light, and noise-cancelling mic

products.name: Standing Desk Converter
products.description: Height-adjustable desk riser, fits dual monitors, quick-lift mechanism

products.name: Laptop Cooling Pad
products.description: Dual-fan cooling pad with RGB lighting, adjustable height, USB pass-through
